factors.data_availability: medium — 640 total specimens across 7 orgs but matched plasma pairs limited (9 donors)
factors.org_discoverability: medium — commercial suppliers discoverable via web; BETRNet academic consortium harder
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — histotype subtype (SCC vs adenocarcinoma) is critical and regionally split; annotated in ~60% of tissue specimens

expected_failure_modes: SCC vs adenocarcinoma distinction is load-bearing: Asian biobanks are predominantly SCC, Western collections are predominantly EAC — pipeline must not aggregate without histotype confirmation
Only 9 confirmed matched FFPE-plasma pairs vs N=30 required — pipeline must surface this gap rather than asserting N is achievable
BETRNet consortium (major US academic esophageal biobank) is not accessible via AminoChain and requires direct academic contact — hard to discover via PubMed
Neoadjuvant treatment status filtering depends on free-text parsing — treatment-naive assertion may not survive per-specimen verification
Tumor location (GEJ vs mid-esophagus) not consistently documented — may affect assay context relevance
